definition: Selective representation that preserves some details while suppressing others.
The computational form an abstraction takes.
The conditions and contexts where an abstraction is valid.
Information or meaning lost when a complex system is represented more simply.
A controlled way to use a system without exposing all internals.
A constraint on permitted values and operations.
A structured representation of records fields relationships constraints and provenance.
A simplified representation of a system through variables parameters structure and assumptions.
Risk introduced when a simplified representation hides context distorts meaning or overstates validity.
